text: JD Vance: The person who is effectively running Iran sat across from the Vice President of the U.S.—that had never happened. I think those people wanted to make a deal… you never know, though.
text_zh: JD Vance：实际上负责伊朗事务的人曾与美国副总统面对面坐着——这种情况以前从未发生过。我认为那些人想达成协议……不过，你永远不知道会发生什么。

text: JD Vance: Trump says to Iran: “If you commit to not having a nuclear weapon, we are going to make Iran economically thrive.”
text_zh: JD Vance：特朗普对伊朗说：“如果你承诺不拥有核武器，我们将使伊朗经济繁荣起来。”

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 U.S. Vice President J.D. Vance on catholic reaction to Trump’s attack of the Pope: It has frustrated me that some of the Catholic clergy have attacked mercilessly the Trump Administration on immigration...and my constant response to that is, how is it humane to allow drug traffickers and sex traffickers to bring little kids across the southern border? @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 美国副总统 J.D. Vance 在回应天主教界对特朗普抨击教皇的反应时表示：一些天主教神职人员在移民问题上无情地攻击特朗普政府，这让我感到沮丧……我对此一贯的回应是，允许毒贩和人口贩子把小孩带过南部边境，这怎么能说是人道呢？ @wfwitness

text: JD Vance: I recognize that a lot of young voters don’t love the policy we have in the Middle East.
text_zh: JD Vance：我承认很多年轻选民并不喜欢我们在中东的政策。

text: WarMonitor Trump is pushing Congress to extend FISA Section 702, the same surveillance program he criticized in 2024. (Reuters) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044178627755995459/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 特朗普正在敦促国会延长《外国情报监视法》（FISA）第702条款，这正是他在2024年曾批评过的同一个监视项目。（路透社） https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044178627755995459/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @Aviation_Intel : Navy MQ-4C Triton Surveillance Drone Crash In The Middle East Finally Confirmed The MQ-4C had been flying over the Persian Gulf on April 9 when it suddenly disappeared from online flight tracking sites. https://www.twz.com/air/navy-mq-4c-triton-surveillance-drone-crash-in-the-middle-east-finally-confirmed tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @Aviation_Intel：海军 MQ-4C“海神”监视无人机在中东坠毁的消息终于得到证实。该 MQ-4C 于 4 月 9 日在波斯湾上空飞行时，突然从在线飞行跟踪网站上消失。 https://www.twz.com/air/navy-mq-4c-triton-surveillance-drone-crash-in-the-middle-east-finally-confirmed 推文

text: OSINTtechnical The US Navy has confirmed that it lost a $240 million MQ-4C Triton reconnaissance drone last week, likely this one that crashed into the Persian Gulf after scouting the Strait of Hormuz. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044176219990622584/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 美国海军已证实上周损失了一架价值 2.4 亿美元的 MQ-4C“海神”侦察无人机，很可能就是这架在侦察霍尔木兹海峡后坠入波斯湾的无人机。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044176219990622584/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor The U.S. birthrate has fallen nearly 20% since 2007, with experts pointing to rising costs making it harder for people to afford having kids. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044176060787384404/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 自 2007 年以来，美国的出生率下降了近 20%，专家指出，生活成本上升使得人们更难负担得起养育孩子。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044176060787384404/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to the Wall Street Journal, citing two U.S. officials, 20 commercial vessels, including cargo, container and tanker vessels, have transited the Strait of Hormuz in the past 24 hours. The vessels, abiding by the now in place U.S. blockade of the strait, did not visit Iranian ports, per the report. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据《华尔街日报》援引两名美国官员的话称，过去 24 小时内，有 20 艘商船（包括货船、集装箱船和油轮）通过了霍尔木兹海峡。据报道，这些船只遵守了目前美国对该海峡的封锁，没有访问伊朗港口。推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 Two car bombs exploded on Imam Khomeini Street in Tehran near a Basij checkpoint, with no casualties reported so far. ➡️ Security forces have sealed off the area and defused a third device, and people are being urged to stay away. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 德黑兰伊玛目霍梅尼街的一个巴斯基（Basij）检查站附近发生两起汽车炸弹爆炸事件，目前尚未有伤亡报告。➡️ 安全部队已封锁该区域并拆除了第三个装置，民众被敦促远离该地区。推文

text: Open Source Intel Israel Ambassador to the U.S.: “We certainly don’t want the French anywhere near these negotiations; we’d like to keep them as far away as possible from pretty much everything, particularly peace negotiations.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044174345103085755/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列驻美大使：“我们当然不希望法国人参与这些谈判；我们希望让他们尽可能远离几乎所有事情，特别是和平谈判。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044174345103085755/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Trump's DOJ is now asking a court to vacate parts of the seditious conspiracy convictions against Proud Boys leaders in the Jan. 6 case, a sign they’re trying to chip away at those rulings. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 特朗普的司法部现在正要求法院撤销“骄傲男孩”（Proud Boys）领导人在 1 月 6 日案件中被判的部分煽动性阴谋罪，这是一个他们试图削弱这些裁决的迹象。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) US President Trump to Fox News' Maria Bartiromo about the war with Iran: "It's over." https://twitter.com/MariaBartiromo/status/2044168738086498306/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）美国总统特朗普在接受福克斯新闻玛丽亚·巴蒂罗莫（Maria Bartiromo）采访时谈到与伊朗的战争：“已经结束了。” https://twitter.com/MariaBartiromo/status/2044168738086498306/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : According to Reuters, citing two Trump administration officials, the Trump administration will let the 30-day waiver on the delivery, sale, and offloading of Iranian-origin crude oil and petroleum products expire without renewing it. The waiver, implemented on March 20, 2026, is set to expire at 12:01 a.m. EST on April 19, 2026, amidst the U.S. naval blockade of vessels entering or exiting Iranian ports through the Strait of Hormuz. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转发 @sentdefender：据路透社援引两名特朗普政府官员的话称，特朗普政府将让针对伊朗原油和石油产品交付、销售和卸货的 30 天豁免期到期，且不再续期。该豁免于 2026 年 3 月 20 日实施，定于美国东部时间 2026 年 4 月 19 日凌晨 12:01 到期，正值美国海军封锁通过霍尔木兹海峡进出伊朗港口的船只之际。推文

text: VP Vance was confronted at a TPUSA event: “You’re killing children!”
text_zh: 万斯副总统在 TPUSA 活动上遭到质问：“你们在杀害儿童！”

text: 🇮🇷 Explosion in District 10 of Tehran involving a homemade explosive device; minor damage and no casualties. — Shortly before, two homemade explosive devices based on liquefied gas detonated on Imam Khomeini Street (District 10 of Tehran, near Jeyhun). — Field investigations by a Fars reporter indicate that the explosion shattered the windows of three houses and caused minor damage to two cars. — The incident resulted in no casualties, as both devices were incomplete. Three people sustained superficial injuries in the incident.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 德黑兰第 10 区发生一起涉及自制爆炸装置的爆炸事件；造成轻微损坏，无人员伤亡。——在此之前不久，德黑兰第 10 区（杰洪附近）伊玛目霍梅尼街发生了两起基于液化气的自制爆炸装置爆炸。——法尔斯通讯社记者的实地调查显示，爆炸震碎了三所房屋的窗户，并对两辆汽车造成轻微损坏。——事件未造成人员伤亡，因为两个装置都不完整。事件中有三人受了轻伤。

text: JD Vance: How can you say that God was never on the side of those who wield the sword? Audience member: Jesus doesn’t support genocide. JD Vance: I agree.
text_zh: JD Vance：你怎么能说上帝从来没有站在挥剑者的一边呢？观众：耶稣不支持种族灭绝。JD Vance：我同意。

text: 🛢 Dated Brent, the benchmark used to price physical crude worldwide, has officially exceeded the Great Financial Crisis peak. At the same time, the nearest Brent futures contract for June delivery is trading at ~$100 per barrel. The spread between the two has surged to ~$35 per barrel, compared to a historical norm of $1-2. This comes as ~13 million barrels per day of supply remains missing from the market, forcing European and Asian refiners to compete aggressively for whatever cargoes are available. The historic gap signals a market that cannot source enough barrels for immediate delivery, even as futures prices assume supply will normalize later. 🔗 Global Markets Investor
text_zh: 🛢 全球实物原油定价基准——布伦特原油现货价格已正式超过大金融危机时期的峰值。与此同时，6 月交割的布伦特原油期货合约交易价格约为每桶 100 美元。两者之间的价差已飙升至每桶约 35 美元，而历史常态为 1-2 美元。这是因为市场仍有约每天 1300 万桶的供应缺口，迫使欧洲和亚洲的炼油商为任何可用的货物进行激烈竞争。这一历史性差距表明，即使期货价格假设供应稍后会正常化，市场也无法获得足够的即时交付原油。🔗 全球市场投资者

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 📉 Israel’s favorability among under-50 men has absolutely cratered. 📎 AF Post
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 📉 以色列在 50 岁以下男性中的好感度已彻底崩盘。📎 AF Post

text: A U.S. Navy MQ-4C Triton surveillance drone crashed on April 9 over the Persian Gulf. It suddenly dropped altitude and disappeared from tracking. It’s a major loss (~$238 million drone) with sensitive surveillance tech onboard
text_zh: 一架美国海军 MQ-4C“海神”监视无人机于 4 月 9 日在波斯湾上空坠毁。它突然降低高度并从跟踪系统中消失。这是一次重大损失（约 2.38 亿美元的无人机），机上载有敏感的监视技术。

text: JD Vance: It has frustrated me that some of the Catholic clergy have attacked the Trump Administration mercilessly on immigration.
text_zh: JD Vance：一些天主教神职人员在移民问题上无情地攻击特朗普政府，这让我感到沮丧。

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "Front_for_the_Liberation_of_Lebanon_Israel's_Little_Secret.pdf" Car bombs are Israeli army and Mossad doctrine They are typical and expected. The whole world failed to stop this insanity decades ago
text_zh: ↩️ 回复黎巴嫩新闻与更新：“Front_for_the_Liberation_of_Lebanon_Israel's_Little_Secret.pdf” 汽车炸弹是以色列军队和摩萨德的教条。它们是典型且可预期的。全世界几十年前就没能阻止这种疯狂。

text: JD Vance: The response to Charlie Kirk getting assassinated by a left-wing furry lover... The response should have been: “Let’s go after left-wing violence and terrorism. Let’s defund the networks of left-wing violence and terrorism.”
text_zh: JD Vance：对于查理·柯克（Charlie Kirk）被一名左翼毛茸茸爱好者暗杀的反应……反应应该是：“让我们打击左翼暴力和恐怖主义。让我们切断左翼暴力和恐怖主义的网络。”

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NBC : A new round of in-person talks between the United States and Iran could be held as early as this week, according to two people familiar with the ongoing negotiations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NBC：据两名熟悉正在进行的谈判的人士称，美国和伊朗之间的新一轮面对面会谈最早可能在本周举行。 @wfwitness

text: JD Vance: The people telling you that Erika (Kirk) wasn’t grieving her husband are full of shit.
text_zh: JD Vance：那些告诉你埃里卡（柯克）没有为她丈夫哀悼的人纯属胡说八道。

text: A U.S. Navy MQ-4C Triton surveillance drone crashed on April 9 over the Persian Gulf. It suddenly dropped altitude and disappeared from tracking. It’s a major loss (~$238 million drone) with sensitive surveillance tech onboard. SOURCE
text_zh: 一架美国海军 MQ-4C“海神”监视无人机于 4 月 9 日在波斯湾上空坠毁。它突然降低高度并从跟踪系统中消失。这是一次重大损失（约 2.38 亿美元的无人机），机上载有敏感的监视技术。来源

text: Maria Bartiromo: Is the Iran war over? Trump: It is over.
text_zh: 玛丽亚·巴蒂罗莫：伊朗战争结束了吗？特朗普：结束了。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷The U.S. Treasury announced that they’re aggressively moving forward with Economic Fury. They advised financial institutions that they will be leveraging the full range of tools they have to deploy secondary sanctions against financial institutions…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 Reuters: The U.S. will not renew a 30-day waiver of sanctions on Iranian oil at sea, which expires on April 19, as part of its efforts to impose maximum pressure on Iran. The waiver allowed around 140 million barrels of oil to be sold on the global market to relieve pressure due to supply contraints caused by the conflict with Iran. The U.S. also didn't renew its waiver for Russia, which expired on Saturday. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国财政部宣布他们正在积极推进‘经济愤怒’（Economic Fury）。他们通知金融机构，将利用手中掌握的全套工具，对金融机构实施二级制裁……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 路透社：作为对伊朗施加最大压力努力的一部分，美国将不会续签针对海上伊朗石油的 30 天制裁豁免，该豁免将于 4 月 19 日到期。该豁免允许约 1.4 亿桶石油在全球市场上销售，以缓解因与伊朗冲突导致的供应限制带来的压力。美国也没有续签针对俄罗斯的豁免，该豁免已于周六到期。 @wfwitness

text: Mossad doing Mossad things as expected — ❗️ 🇮🇷 BREAKING: Two car bombs exploded on Imam Khomeini street, Tehran, near a Basij checkpoint So far, the death toll is zero. Area has been cordoned off. @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: 摩萨德正在做摩萨德该做的事，正如预期的那样 — ❗️ 🇮🇷 快讯：德黑兰伊玛目霍梅尼街的一个巴斯基（Basij）检查站附近发生两起汽车炸弹爆炸。到目前为止，死亡人数为零。该区域已被封锁。 @Middle_East_Spectator

text: WarMonitor Trump is quick to say “it wasn’t my election,” even as he fears it could carry into the midterms. Trump on Viktor Orban: “He was my friend. It wasn’t my election, but he was my friend, a good man. He did a good job on the immigration issue. He didn’t let people come and destroy his country, as happened in Italy.” https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2044167834666774803/photo/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 特朗普急于说“这不是我的选举”，尽管他担心这可能会影响到中期选举。特朗普谈到维克多·欧尔班（Viktor Orban）：“他是我的朋友。这不是我的选举，但他曾是我的朋友，一个好人。他在移民问题上做得很好。他没有让人们进来摧毁他的国家，就像在意大利发生的那样。” https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2044167834666774803/photo/1 - 反特朗普共和党人推文

text: Open Source Intel Speaker Mike Johnson says he contacted President Trump over backlash to a now-deleted image critics said depicted him as Jesus Christ, telling him it was not received as intended. "I talked with the president about it as soon as I saw it. I told him I don't think it was received the same way he intended it. He agreed and pulled it down. It was the right thing to do." "I don't think he thought it was sacrilegious at all." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 众议院议长迈克·约翰逊（Mike Johnson）表示，他已就一张现已被删除的图片引发的强烈反对联系了特朗普总统，批评者称该图片将他描绘成耶稣基督，他告诉特朗普这并没有达到预期的效果。“我一看到它就和总统谈了。我告诉他，我认为它并没有像他预期的那样被接收。他同意并将其删除了。这是正确的做法。”“我不认为他觉得这有什么亵渎之处。”推文

text: Open Source Intel HERO FOOTAGE 🔴 Arkansas principal Kirk Moore charging and subduing a school shooter, helping save students’ lives. He is recovering from injuries. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044167884918685760/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 英雄画面 🔴 阿肯色州校长柯克·摩尔（Kirk Moore）冲向并制服了一名校园枪手，帮助挽救了学生的生命。他正在从伤势中恢复。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044167884918685760/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Sen. John Kennedy on Democrats: "They hyperventilate on their yoga mats if you use the wrong pronoun. They think our kids ought to be able to change genders at recess!" "They have a unique solution to the crime problem. They have a way to get crime down. It's just don't Prosecute anybody!" "How can I put this, their motherboard is Fried. I mean, Republicans aren't perfect, but they're crazy." "The wing of the Democrat Party that is in control, Ocasio-Cortez and Mamdani and Bernie...they hate George Washington and Thomas Jefferson and Abraham Lincoln and Dr. Seuss and Mr. Potato Head!" "I mean, the American people deserve to be governed by normal people. And these are not normal people. They're deeply weird. They're nauseously woke." "They have the right to believe what they believe. But I have the right to my opinion too. And I think their motherboard is fried, Deep Fried. " tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 参议员约翰·肯尼迪（John Kennedy）谈民主党人：“如果你用了错误的代词，他们就会在瑜伽垫上过度换气。他们认为我们的孩子应该能够在课间休息时改变性别！”“他们对犯罪问题有一个独特的解决方案。他们有一种降低犯罪率的方法。那就是不要起诉任何人！”“我该怎么说呢，他们的主板烧坏了。我的意思是，共和党人并不完美，但他们是疯子。”“民主党中掌权的那一派，奥卡西奥-科尔特斯（Ocasio-Cortez）、曼达尼（Mamdani）和伯尼（Bernie）……他们讨厌乔治·华盛顿、托马斯·杰斐逊、亚伯拉罕·林肯、苏斯博士（Dr. Seuss）和土豆头先生（Mr. Potato Head）！”“我的意思是，美国人民理应由正常人来治理。而这些人不是正常人。他们非常怪异。他们觉醒得令人作呕。”“他们有权相信他们所相信的。但我也有权发表我的意见。我认为他们的主板烧坏了，彻底烧坏了。”推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷 In an apparent car bombing attack in Tehran, explosions were heard, with government media reporting that one car was disabled before exploding but two exploded at one of the city's checkpoints. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Alleged reports from opposition media of two strong explosions in west Tehran, coinciding with reports of a car bombing. Reports, from opposition outlets, suggest a car bomb went off in the Jeyhoun area near Goli intersection, targeting the Imam Khomeini checkpoint between Jeyhoun and Yadegar. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷 在德黑兰发生的一起明显的汽车炸弹袭击中，听到了爆炸声，政府媒体报道称，一辆汽车在爆炸前被拦截，但在该市的一个检查站有两辆车发生了爆炸。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 反对派媒体据称报道称，德黑兰西部发生两起强烈爆炸，与汽车炸弹袭击的报道相吻合。来自反对派媒体的报道称，在杰洪（Jeyhoun）地区靠近戈利（Goli）十字路口处发生了一起汽车炸弹爆炸，目标是杰洪和亚达加（Yadegar）之间的伊玛目霍梅尼检查站。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 In an apparent car bombing attack in Tehran, explosions were heard, with government media reporting that one car was disabled before exploding but two exploded at one of the city's checkpoints. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 在德黑兰发生的一起明显的汽车炸弹袭击中，听到了爆炸声，政府媒体报道称，一辆汽车在爆炸前被拦截，但在该市的一个检查站有两辆车发生了爆炸。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Trump: This was put out by the CATO Institute, who hates “TRUMP,” but they can’t hide the facts. The Democrats were a DISASTER on the Border, and we were the best in the History of the U.S.A.! https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044165292570398772/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：这是卡托研究所（CATO Institute）发布的，他们讨厌“特朗普”，但他们无法掩盖事实。民主党人在边境问题上是一场灾难，而我们是美国历史上最好的！ https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044165292570398772/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Reports say two car bombs detonated on Tehran’s Imam Khomeini Street near a Basij post. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 报道称，两枚汽车炸弹在德黑兰伊玛目霍梅尼街的一个巴斯基（Basij）哨所附近引爆。推文

text: Open Source Intel Channel 14 Report: After the Iranian delegation returned from Pakistan empty handed, Pezeshkian lashed out at members of the team. Pezeshkian: “We are weeks away from collapse. They are cutting off our main source of income. I don’t know how we will pay salaries.” Via C14 and @DBalazada tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 14频道报道：在伊朗代表团空手从巴基斯坦返回后，佩泽希齐扬（Pezeshkian）对团队成员大发雷霆。佩泽希齐扬：“我们距离崩溃还有几周的时间。他们正在切断我们的主要收入来源。我不知道我们将如何支付工资。” 通过 C14 和 @DBalazada 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian report: Strong explosions heard in western Tehran. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗报道：德黑兰西部听到强烈爆炸声。推文

text: Open Source Intel Hosam al-Din Ashna, former advisor to Hassan Rouhani and a founder of Iran's intelligence service, attacked Lebanese Parliament Speaker Nabih Berri and warned of a split within Lebanon's Shiite community. He also condemned the Lebanese-Israeli negotiations. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044162679988781278/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 哈桑·鲁哈尼（Hassan Rouhani）的前顾问、伊朗情报机构创始人之一霍萨姆·丁·阿什纳（Hosam al-Din Ashna）抨击了黎巴嫩议会议长纳比·贝里（Nabih Berri），并警告黎巴嫩什叶派社区内部可能出现分裂。他还谴责了黎巴嫩与以色列的谈判。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044162679988781278/photo/1 推文

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Reports of a car bomb explosion near a checkpoint on Imam Khomeini Street in Tehran
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 报道称德黑兰伊玛目霍梅尼街的一个检查站附近发生汽车炸弹爆炸

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇵🇸 The genocide in Gaza continues with little coverage in Western media.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇵🇸 加沙的种族灭绝仍在继续，西方媒体几乎没有报道。

text: ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 🇩🇪 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 WSJ: European countries are preparing a post-war naval mission to restore shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, deliberately designed to exclude 'belligerent' states including the United States, Israel and Iran. The plan, backed by countries including Germany, the United Kingdom and France, would involve mine-clearing operations, naval escorts and surveillance missions, European diplomats specifiying that participating vessels would not operate under U.S. command. The mission’s objectives include enabling stranded vessels to exit the Gulf, conducting large-scale demining after Iranian mining operations, and eventually establishing escort systems to ensure safe passage. However, European officials indicated the plan may require coordination with Iran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 🇩🇪 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 《华尔街日报》：欧洲国家正在准备一项战后海军任务，以恢复通过霍尔木兹海峡的航运，该计划特意排除了包括美国、以色列和伊朗在内的“交战”国家。该计划得到了包括德国、英国和法国在内的国家的支持，将涉及扫雷行动、海军护航和监视任务，欧洲外交官明确表示，参与的船只不会在美国指挥下行动。该任务的目标包括使受困船只能够离开海湾，在伊朗布雷行动后进行大规模扫雷，并最终建立护航系统以确保安全通行。然而，欧洲官员表示，该计划可能需要与伊朗进行协调。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 Israeli media correspondents discuss Israel’s plan to ignite internal conflict between the Lebanese government and Hezbollah
text_zh: 🇮🇱 以色列媒体记者讨论以色列挑起黎巴嫩政府与真主党之间内部冲突的计划

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The White House announced that 103 empty ships are enroute to the U.S. to load U.S. crude, with 20 sailing under European flags and 20 under Asian flags. They claim that the U.S. now produces more oil than Saudi Arabia and Russian combined and more natural gas than Russia, China, and Iran combined. They reassured that the Trump administration's energy plsn is ready to supply reliable and abundent energy to nations that have been cut from supplies due to the closure of the Strait of Hormuz. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 白宫宣布，103 艘空船正在前往美国装载美国原油，其中 20 艘悬挂欧洲旗帜，20 艘悬挂亚洲旗帜。他们声称，美国现在的石油产量超过了沙特阿拉伯和俄罗斯的总和，天然气产量超过了俄罗斯、中国和伊朗的总和。他们保证，特朗普政府的能源计划已准备好为因霍尔木兹海峡关闭而供应中断的国家提供可靠且充足的能源。 @wfwitness

text: 🇵🇸 11 martyrs in Gaza today after Israeli airstrikes resume with greater frequency
text_zh: 🇵🇸 以色列空袭频率增加，加沙今日有 11 名烈士牺牲

text: The U.S. said no vessels left Iranian ports during the first day of its blockade, with six merchant ships turning back after U.S. warnings. Over 10,000 personnel and multiple warships are involved, but no direct enforcement actions have occurred. Shipping through the Strait of Hormuz has continued, with over 20 vessels passing. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 美国表示，在其封锁的第一天，没有船只离开伊朗港口，六艘商船在收到美国警告后折返。超过 10,000 名人员和多艘军舰参与其中，但没有发生直接的执法行动。通过霍尔木兹海峡的航运仍在继续，已有超过 20 艘船只通过。来源：《华尔街日报》

text: Europe is preparing a plan to reopen the Strait of Hormuz after the war ends, led by Macron and the U.K., but without U.S. involvement. The idea is to form an international, defensive mission that excludes countries directly involved in the conflict—like the U.S., Israel, and Iran—so it is more acceptable, particularly to Tehran. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 欧洲正在准备一项在战争结束后重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的计划，由马克龙和英国领导，但没有美国参与。其想法是组建一个国际性的防御任务，排除直接参与冲突的国家——如美国、以色列和伊朗——以便让德黑兰更容易接受。来源：《华尔街日报》

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 Axios: The U.S. Department of the Treasury has eased sanctions on Venezuela’s state-run financial system in a bid to stabilise the country’s economy and support the Rodriguez administration amid protests of low wages from public sector workers. The move allows major state banks, including the central bank, to use U.S. dollars, receive oil revenues, and reconnect with the global financial system—steps aimed at unlocking billions in funds and accelerating economic recovery. Rather than fully lifting sanctions, the U.S. has issued targeted licences to specific financial institutions, signalling a controlled reintegration of Venezuela into the U.S.-led financial system while maintaining oversight. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 Axios：美国财政部已放宽对委内瑞拉国有金融体系的制裁，旨在稳定该国经济，并在公共部门工人抗议低工资的情况下支持罗德里格斯（Rodriguez）政府。此举允许包括中央银行在内的主要国有银行使用美元、接收石油收入并重新连接全球金融体系——这些步骤旨在释放数十亿资金并加速经济复苏。美国没有完全解除制裁，而是向特定金融机构发放了有针对性的许可证，标志着委内瑞拉在保持监督的同时，受控地重新融入美国主导的金融体系。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Reuters: Lebanon and the International Monetary Fund are reportedly discussing a rapid financing package worth between $800 million and $1 billion to support the country amid ongoing economic and security pressures. The proposed funding would be aimed at budget support and humanitarian needs, as Lebanon continues to deal with the impact of the war and its prolonged financial crisis. Talks are ongoing, with the IMF also engaging Lebanese authorities on a broader reform program that could unlock longer-term financial assistance. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 路透社：据报道，黎巴嫩和国际货币基金组织（IMF）正在讨论一项价值 8 亿至 10 亿美元的快速融资方案，以在持续的经济和安全压力下支持该国。拟议的资金将用于预算支持和人道主义需求，因为黎巴嫩仍在应对战争的影响及其长期的金融危机。谈判正在进行中，国际货币基金组织也正在与黎巴嫩当局就一项更广泛的改革计划进行接触，该计划可能解锁长期的财政援助。 @wfwitness
